message.content:
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram Test
rectangle "alice: Orange World" as alice
rectangle ": Bob" as bob

activate alice
activate bob

alice -> bob : Hi
bob --> alice : ACK

alice -> bob : Auth Req

alt [successful case]
  bob --> alice : Auth Accepted
end

deactivate alice
deactivate bob

rectangle "alice: Orange World" as alice2
rectangle ": Bob" as bob2

@enduml
